Role/Contribution: Founder of Daoism, author of Dao De Jing
Political philosopher, advisor to Chandragupta Maurya
First translator of Indian Buddhist texts into Chinese
Translated Small Perfections of Wisdom Sutra and A Land of Bliss Sutra
Translated numerous sutras, including Lotus Sutra
Major translator of Buddhist texts into Chinese
Founder of the White Lotus Society
First Patriarch of Pure Land school
Major translator and founder of Faxiang school
Third Patriarch and systematizer of Huayan school
